excerpts.content_summary: corrected fermion operator described as Collatz orbit log-cost from p+1, with delta and alpha; electron/effective orbit caveat follows
explicit weakness: muon effective orbit not directly obtained from a single Collatz starting number; derived from mode quantization
charged-lepton Omega_ij and F_ij holonomic correction tables
document notes heavy leptons/muon may require RG / higher zeta zero contributions

policy: excerpt ledger only; active operator does not import observed masses from source text
